title: HousePanel Camera Webhook Event v1
description: Payload schema for POST /v1/webhooks/camera. This schema is stable from first release. Breaking changes will be introduced as /v2/ path variants; /v1/ will remain supported until explicit deprecation notice.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Always '1' for this endpoint.

timestamp.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp of the camera motion event.

camera_name.description: Human-readable label for the camera (e.g. 'Front Door').

camera_id.description: Optional opaque camera identifier from UniFi Protect.

narrative.description: Natural language description of the camera motion event, as generated by unifi-camera-summarizer.

gate.description: Optional gate/verifier output from unifi-camera-summarizer. Included when available.

examples.narrative: A person in a blue jacket approaches the front door and presses the doorbell.
